context: Tests whether the agent implements the purchase notification toast widget following the skill's DOM safety, timing, session cap, page restriction, and queue size rules.

checklist.name: DOM createElement construction
checklist.description: Toast DOM nodes are built using document.createElement (not innerHTML or insertAdjacentHTML) for elements that display customer data

checklist.name: textContent for customer data
checklist.description: Customer-derived strings (firstName, location, variantTitle) are assigned via .textContent — not via innerHTML, template literals injected into innerHTML, or string concatenation into innerHTML

checklist.name: Auto-dismiss at 5000ms
checklist.description: Each toast is automatically dismissed after 5000ms (5 seconds)

checklist.name: Gap between toasts 8000ms
checklist.description: There is an 8000ms (8 second) delay between showing consecutive toasts

checklist.name: Max 3 toasts per session
checklist.description: The widget shows a maximum of 3 toasts per session (or widget-notes.md states 3 as the per-session cap)

checklist.name: Not on cart/checkout
checklist.description: The code or widget-notes.md explicitly states the widget should NOT appear on cart or checkout pages

checklist.name: Queue capped at 6
checklist.description: The toast queue is initialised with at most 6 items from the recentPurchases array (e.g. .slice(0, 6))

checklist.name: data-product-id attribute
checklist.description: The product ID is read from a [data-product-id] DOM attribute (via querySelector or getAttribute), not from a hardcoded value or a different mechanism

checklist.name: Conditional initialisation
checklist.description: The toast widget only initialises when a [data-product-id] element is present on the page

checklist.name: Close button
checklist.description: Each toast includes a dismiss/close button that removes the toast when clicked

checklist.name: timeAgo displayed
checklist.description: The toast displays the timeAgo value from the purchase data (how long ago the purchase was made)

checklist.name: Widget notes completeness
checklist.description: widget-notes.md documents: per-session cap (3), gap between toasts (8000ms or 8s), auto-dismiss duration (5000ms or 5s), and the XSS prevention approach (textContent / DOM methods)
